title: bupleurum tenuissimum var. procumbens
intro: Bupleurum tenuissimum var. procumbens is a variety of the Bupleurum tenuissimum plant, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It is native to East Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and hepatoprotective effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating liver and kidney issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. Bupleurum tenuissimum var. procumbens can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
